19 832 people sensitised: including 17 357 via door-to-door in 7 352 households (out of 18 584 expected, 40%). 1 648 students and 60 teachers sensitised. 241 Red Cross volunteers active. 699 cases of refusal/hesitancy recorded. 59 community alerts (rate 4.2%). 18 local radios engaged. Community dialogue with leaders of Nyakasanza neighbourhood (Bunia). Press conference by DG INSP with 25 journalists. Wide sensitisation by the military Governor against the 'empty coffin' rumour. Rumour circulating in Muzimaria area about coffins being buried empty by response teams. Chiefs in some neighbourhoods afraid to call response teams.
Youth uprising against the response team; windshields of two vehicles damaged by projectiles. Community dialogue and engagement with local leaders initiated.
